name: Varanasi

seo.title: Packers & Movers in Varanasi — 290+ Verified Vendors | Radhe packers and movers
seo.description: Compare 290+ verified packers and movers in Varanasi. Instant quotes starting ₹3,500. Sigra, BHU, Lanka, Sarnath covered. Live GPS tracking included.

hero.title: Packers & Movers in Varanasi
hero.subtitle: Lanka to Sigra, BHU campus to Sarnath — 290+ verified movers in the City of Light.

intro: Varanasi's unique geography — ghats, narrow old-city lanes, and modern colonies on the NH-19 corridor — makes moving a specialist task. Radhe packers and movers's 290+ verified vendors are experienced with both the old city's constraints and the newer areas around BHU, Sigra, and Sarnath.
whyUs: The Ghats area requires hand-trolleys and manpower for narrow lanes where trucks can't reach. Our vendors carry the right equipment and know exactly which streets are accessible for vehicles.

faqs.q: Can you move from narrow lanes near the Ghats?
faqs.a: Yes. We use hand trolleys and manpower for areas inaccessible to vehicles.

faqs.q: What is the cost for a local move in Varanasi?
faqs.a: Starting from ₹3,500 for 1 BHK. 2 BHK typically ₹6,000 – ₹10,000.

faqs.q: Do you handle BHU campus relocations?
faqs.a: Yes, we regularly handle residential moves within and around the BHU campus.
